title: Mark Taylor
compiled_truth: Mark Taylor is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-11-23), Mark Taylor sent 3832 and received 5663 emails, totalling 9495 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (335), [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (242), [David Forster](people/david-forster) (218), [Carol Clair](people/carol-clair) (203), [Brent Hendry](people/brent-hendry) (151). Mailbox folders observed: agency_com, archive, contacts, isda, sent, sent_items.
